mapper.insert: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0212-06_2#Sql001 */ INTO T_JP_ORDER ( IFA_ORDER_NO, IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, CUSTOMER_ID, SPECIFIC_KBN, BRAND_CD, MARKET, ORDER_STATUS, TRADE_KBN, QUANTITY, LIMIT, AZUKARI_KBN, PAYMENT_LIMIT, REPAYMENT_METHOD_TYPE, REQUEST_TYPE, ORDER_SYUBETSU, ORDER_SYUBETSU_LIST, KANYU_KBN, JUTYU_KBN, CHECK_INSIDER, CHECK_SOR, CHECK_COMP_WRN_ALERT, SHIKIN_SEIKAKU_KBN, USER_ID, CANCEL_USER_ID, TESUURYOU_KBN, ALTER_FLG, AUTO_ORDER_KIND, RBE_ORDER_KIND, SASINARI_KBN, PRICE, TRIGGER_ZONE, TRIGGER_PRICE, OCO_SASINARI_KBN, OCO_SASHINE, DONE_SASINARI_KBN, DONE_SASHINE, DONE_RBE_ORDER_KIND, DONE_TRIGGER_ZONE, DONE_TRIGGER_NEDAN, DONE_OCO_SASINARI_KBN, DONE_OCO_SASHINE, DONE_LIMIT, JO_ZEI_KBN, ALTER_ORDER_NUM, RBE_ORDER_STATUS, ORDER_TYPE, ORDER_NUM, ACCEPT_DATE, ACCEPT_TIME, SHUBETU, CODE, MESSAGE, ESTIMATE_PRICE, AMOUNT, COMMISSION, CONSUMPTION_TAX, CAPITAL_GAIN_TAX, NET_AMOUNT, COST, TRADE_DATE, SETTLEMENT_DATE, ACCEPT_LIMIT, DONE_ACCEPT_LIMIT, COM_ID_R, AC_POSITION, AC_POSITION_AFTER, AC_BALANCE, AC_BALANCE_AFTER, ORDERED_MARKET, TRADE_DEFICIT_AMOUNT, ISA_BUY_LIMIT, JRNISA_TRANSFER_AMOUNT, SOR_LINK_KBN, UNCLOSED_QUANTITY, UNCLOSED_QUANTITY_AFTER, MARGIN_CAPABILITY, MARGIN_CAPABILITY_AFTER, ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE, ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE_AFTER, APP_INTEREST_RATES, APP_LENDING_STOCK, PREMIUM, TPOINT, TPOINT_AFTER, DAILY_CREDIT_KBN, PAYMENT_LIMIT_DATE, DATE_KBN, BROKER_CODE, INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER, CCS_SEND_DATE ) VALUES( #{req.ifaOrderNo}, #{req.ifaOrderSubNo}, #{req.butenCode}, #{req.accountNumber}, #{req.customerId}, #{req.specificKbn}, #{req.brandCd}, #{req.market}, #{req.orderStatus}, #{req.tradeKbn}, #{req.quantity}, #{req.limit}, null, #{req.paymentLimit}, #{req.repaymentMethodType}, #{req.requestType}, #{req.orderSyubetsu}, #{req.orderSyubetsuList}, #{req.kanyuKbn}, #{req.jutyuKbn}, #{req.checkInsider}, #{req.checkSor}, null, null, #{req.userId}, null, #{req.tesuuryouKbn}, #{req.alterFlg}, null, #{req.rbeOrderKind}, #{req.sasinariKbn}, #{req.price}, #{req.triggerZone}, #{req.triggerPrice}, #{req.ocoSasinariKbn}, #{req.ocoSashine}, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, #{req.joZeiKbn}, #{req.alterOrderNum}, #{req.rbeOrderStatus}, #{req.orderType}, #{req.orderNum}, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, #{req.dailyCreditKbn}, #{req.paymentDeadlineDate}, #{req.dateKbn}, #{req.brokerCode}, #{req.intermediaryEmpCd}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.createUser}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{req.updateUser}, null )
mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0212-03_1#Sql001 */ A.IFA_ORDER_NO , A.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO , A.BUTEN_CODE , A.ACCOUNT_NUMBER , A.CUSTOMER_ID , A.SPECIFIC_KBN , A.BRAND_CD , A.MARKET , A.ORDER_STATUS , A.TRADE_KBN , A.QUANTITY , A.LIMIT , A.AZUKARI_KBN , A.PAYMENT_LIMIT , A.REPAYMENT_METHOD_TYPE , A.REQUEST_TYPE , A.ORDER_SYUBETSU , A.ORDER_SYUBETSU_LIST , A.KANYU_KBN , A.JUTYU_KBN , A.CHECK_INSIDER , A.CHECK_SOR , A.CHECK_COMP_WRN_ALERT , A.SHIKIN_SEIKAKU_KBN , A.USER_ID , A.CANCEL_USER_ID , A.TESUURYOU_KBN , A.ALTER_FLG , A.AUTO_ORDER_KIND , A.RBE_ORDER_KIND , A.SASINARI_KBN , A.PRICE , A.TRIGGER_ZONE , A.TRIGGER_PRICE , A.OCO_SASINARI_KBN , A.OCO_SASHINE , A.DONE_SASINARI_KBN , A.DONE_SASHINE , A.DONE_RBE_ORDER_KIND , A.DONE_TRIGGER_ZONE , A.DONE_TRIGGER_NEDAN , A.DONE_OCO_SASINARI_KBN , A.DONE_OCO_SASHINE , A.DONE_LIMIT , A.JO_ZEI_KBN , A.ALTER_ORDER_NUM , A.RBE_ORDER_STATUS , A.ORDER_TYPE , A.ORDER_NUM , A.ACCEPT_DATE , A.ACCEPT_TIME , A.SHUBETU , A.CODE , A.MESSAGE , A.ESTIMATE_PRICE , A.AMOUNT , A.COMMISSION , A.CONSUMPTION_TAX , A.CAPITAL_GAIN_TAX , A.NET_AMOUNT , A.COST , A.TRADE_DATE , A.SETTLEMENT_DATE , A.ACCEPT_LIMIT , A.DONE_ACCEPT_LIMIT , A.COM_ID_R , A.AC_POSITION , A.AC_POSITION_AFTER , A.AC_BALANCE , A.AC_BALANCE_AFTER , A.ORDERED_MARKET , A.TRADE_DEFICIT_AMOUNT , A.ISA_BUY_LIMIT , A.JRNISA_TRANSFER_AMOUNT , A.SOR_LINK_KBN , A.UNCLOSED_QUANTITY , A.UNCLOSED_QUANTITY_AFTER , A.MARGIN_CAPABILITY , A.MARGIN_CAPABILITY_AFTER , A.ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE , A.ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE_AFTER , A.APP_INTEREST_RATES , A.APP_LENDING_STOCK , A.PREMIUM , A.TPOINT , A.TPOINT_AFTER , A.BROKER_CODE , A.INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD , A.CREATE_TIME , A.CREATE_USER , A.UPDATE_TIME , A.UPDATE_USER , A.CCS_SEND_DATE FROM T_JP_ORDER A WHERE A.ORDER_NUM = #{orderNum} AND A.BUTEN_CODE = #{butenCode} AND A.ACCEPT_DATE >= SUBSTR(#{orderDayTime}, 1, 8) AND A.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO = ( SELECT MAX(IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO) FROM T_JP_ORDER B WHERE B.ORDER_NUM = #{orderNum} AND B.BUTEN_CODE = #{butenCode} AND B.ACCEPT_DATE >= SUBSTR(#{orderDayTime}, 1, 8) )
mapper.update: UPDATE /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0212-06_2#Sql002 */ T_JP_ORDER SET UPDATE_TIME = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , UPDATE_USER = #{req.updateUser} , ACCEPT_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') WHERE IFA_ORDER_NO = #{req.ifaOrderNo} AND IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO = #{req.ifaOrderSubNo}
mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0212-06_2#Sql001 */ TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_T_JP_ORDER.NEXTVAL, 10, '0') AS IFA_ORDER_NO FROM DUAL
